I woke up and thought of you.
I found a patch of light by the window.
The house is quiet. I'm awake.
I'm here. We can take our time.
I stretched already. It felt nice.
I think we should get up.
The day is waiting for us.
I opened my eyes and smiled.
A soft start might be nice today.
I heard the world waking up.
I want to see what the morning looks like.
I've been awake for a bit.
I think today's a good day to be us.
